queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT 
    date,
    unemployment_rate,
    participation_rate,
    unemployed_labour_force,
    labour_force,
    unemployment_monthly_change
FROM openmalaysia.mart_unemployment_trend
ORDER BY date ASC
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT 
    date,
    unemployment_rate,
    participation_rate,
    unemployed_labour_force,
    labour_force,
    unemployment_monthly_change
FROM openmalaysia.mart_unemployment_trend
ORDER BY date ASC
